sources.name: RASAM Dataset
sources.publisher: Calfa, BULAC Library, GIS MOMM, DISTAM
sources.attribution_requirements: Preserve Apache-2.0 notices for RASAM repository files, cite RASAM publications, and cite BULAC/BiNA provenance for IIIF images.
sources.dataset_size: 450 page images plus PAGE XML in repository/IIIF workflow; exact byte size not published on the README.
sources.layout_annotation_availability: available: text regions, baselines, and texts.
sources.footnote_coverage: limited/unknown; marginal notes are included in RASAM 2 line annotation scope.
sources.checksum_availability: not published in README; downloader computes local SHA-256.
sources.known_limitations: Historical handwritten manuscripts, not modern printed clean documents; PAGE XML is in the Apache-2.0 repository, while images are external BULAC IIIF assets and must be verified per manuscript/item rights before download.
sources.recommended_use: First tiny sample for validating PAGE XML, historical layout annotations, license metadata, and downloader resume logic.
official_evidence: Repository README states 450 images paired with ground truth.
Repository README states PAGE XML ground truth for RASAM 1.
Repository README states Apache License 2.0.
BULAC/BiNA reuse page states images of public-domain documents are reusable under Public Domain Mark 1.0 unless an explicit contrary notice is present.
Selected first-batch IIIF manifests report Droits: Domaine public.
license_notes: RASAM repository contents used here are approved under Apache-2.0.
External IIIF images are approved only after per-manuscript BULAC/BiNA rights metadata reports public-domain status.
Do not assume GitHub Apache-2.0 covers images served outside the repository.

first_batch.image_rights_policy: download only selected IIIF pages whose manuscript/item rights state Domaine public

sources.name: SARD Synthetic Arabic Recognition Dataset
sources.attribution_requirements: Preserve Apache-2.0 notice and cite dataset when used.
sources.dataset_size: 743,000 synthetic document images according to dataset card.
sources.checksum_availability: Hugging Face file hashes may be available per file; local downloader computes SHA-256.
sources.known_limitations: Synthetic text/images; dataset card has incomplete data creation details in some revisions.
sources.recommended_use: Commercially usable clean synthetic printed-layout source after manually selecting a small sample split.
official_evidence: Hugging Face card declares Apache-2.0 license.
Dataset card describes clean synthetic book-layout data with no distortions.
license_notes: Approved only for small samples until exact file-level sample paths are selected.

sources.name: craneset/arabic-ocr Hugging Face Sample
sources.dataset_size: Hugging Face hosted sample: 8 rows, 2.2 MB. Full dataset requires contact and is not free.
sources.number_of_documents_or_pages: 8 sample rows on Hugging Face; full dataset claims over 1M pages but requires contact.
sources.ground_truth_format: TXT continuous text and JSON word-level boxes.
sources.mixed_language_coverage: roadmap mentions future English but current sample is Arabic.
sources.checksum_availability: Hugging Face/Xet metadata may provide file hashes; local downloader computes SHA-256.
sources.known_limitations: Sample is tiny; full dataset is not free and requires contacting maintainers.
sources.recommended_use: Best first modern printed Arabic sample after RASAM if page-like word-level synthetic data is acceptable.
official_evidence: Hugging Face card declares MIT license.
Card lists 8 rows and 2.2 MB sample size.
Card describes PNG images, JSON word labels, and TXT text files.
license_notes: Approved only for public Hugging Face sample; do not contact/download paid full dataset automatically.

sources.name: Humans in the Loop Arabic Documents OCR Dataset
sources.publisher: Humans in the Loop / Techfugees Lebanon
sources.attribution_requirements: No legal attribution required by CC0; project should cite source for provenance.
sources.ground_truth_format: Line/body boxes and title transcription; full page exact text not stated.
sources.layout_annotation_availability: available: page polygon, line/body boxes, title boxes.
sources.footnote_coverage: possible in document mix but not specified.
sources.historical_document_coverage: mixed document classes, not historical focus.
sources.known_limitations: Access requires filling a form; exact full-page ground truth is not stated.
sources.recommended_use: Layout and detection reference after manual access approval, not exact OCR ground-truth training by default.
official_evidence: Official page states CC0 1.0 public domain dedication.
Official page describes 10K images and 12 document classes.
license_notes: Do not auto-submit form or accept terms. Manual approval required before download.

sources.name: OpenITI MAKHZAN
sources.attribution_requirements: Attribution required; derivatives must be noncommercial and share alike.
sources.mixed_language_coverage: multi-language corpus, not necessarily mixed pages.
sources.checksum_availability: Zenodo file checksums expected, not verified locally yet.
sources.known_limitations: NonCommercial ShareAlike license; not suitable for commercial training.
official_evidence: Journal page states CC BY-NC-SA license.
Journal page states page images plus ALTO XML and metadata.
license_notes: Blocked for commercial use and sample downloads in this project stage.

sources.name: Muharaf-public
sources.dataset_size: 24,495 line images; Hugging Face download size about 1.317 GB.
sources.layout_annotation_availability: not page layout; line images only.
sources.checksum_availability: Hugging Face file hashes may be available; local downloader computes SHA-256.
sources.known_limitations: Noncommercial license and handwritten line scope.
sources.recommended_use: Research-only HTR line benchmark, not commercial clean printed OCR data.
official_evidence: Hugging Face card declares CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 license.
Card states 24,495 line images with corresponding text.
license_notes: Blocked for commercial use and sample downloads in this project stage.

sources.name: HICMA Dataset
sources.known_limitations: Noncommercial only; calligraphy/handwritten, not printed documents.
official_evidence: Official page states CC BY-NC 4.0.
Official page states 5,031 images and CSV labels.
license_notes: Blocked for commercial use and sample downloads in this project stage.

sources.name: Arabic OCR Corpus v2 from Qatar National Library
sources.license: QNL no-copyright-claim statement for scans/direct reproductions; metadata CC0-1.0
sources.redistribution_status: metadata_cc0; OCR text/reproduction statement requires legal review
sources.attribution_requirements: Cite Qatar National Library and dataset record.
sources.ground_truth_format: OCR text, not verified exact ground truth.
sources.page_level_alignment_availability: not available; item-level OCR text corpus.
sources.mixed_language_coverage: yes, fragments of other languages can occur.
sources.historical_document_coverage: printed works, many out of copyright.
sources.known_limitations: OCR text is not exact ground truth; not page aligned.
sources.recommended_use: Do not use as OCR ground truth. Useful only for metadata/text-source exploration after legal review.
official_evidence: Official page states OCR text corpus, checksums, and metadata.
Official page states metadata CC0 and no copyright claims to scans/direct reproductions.
license_notes: Condition: not acceptable as exact OCR ground truth without manual QA and legal review.

sources.name: PATS-A01 Printed Arabic Text Set
sources.publisher: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals / Arabic Text Recognition project
sources.dataset_size: Eight font archives around 7.1 MB to 10.1 MB each plus text files.
sources.historical_document_coverage: classic Arabic book text rendered in fonts; not historical scans.
sources.known_limitations: No explicit license found on official page.
sources.recommended_use: Technically useful line-level rendered text, but blocked until license is verified.
official_evidence: Official page lists font archives and ground-truth text files but no license statement found.

sources.name: KAFD: Arabic Font Database
sources.publisher: Linguistic Data Consortium / KFUPM / Qassim University
sources.attribution_requirements: Follow LDC agreement and citation requirements.
sources.dataset_size: Approximately 2.5 million scanned Arabic printed pages; page and line formats.
sources.historical_document_coverage: printed publications across subjects, not historical focus.
sources.known_limitations: Paid/restricted LDC license; no automatic download.
sources.recommended_use: Potentially strong page-level printed Arabic source only after explicit LDC license acquisition.
official_evidence: LDC catalog states data and LDC User Agreement licensing.
license_notes: No download without user-approved LDC access and license review.

sources.name: mssqpi Arabic OCR Dataset
sources.checksum_availability: Hugging Face file metadata may include hashes.
sources.known_limitations: License not visible; snippets only 7-10 characters.
sources.recommended_use: Blocked until license is explicit; not suitable for page-layout distortion source.
official_evidence: Hugging Face card states size, rows, image/text fields but no explicit license found.

sources.name: Arabic OCR Synthetic Scans Faker 300k
sources.historical_document_coverage: synthetic aged/degraded style, not real historical scans.
sources.checksum_availability: Hugging Face file-level SHA256 visible for Parquet pointers.
sources.known_limitations: Already degraded/distorted; full dataset far exceeds 2 GB safety limit.
sources.recommended_use: Rejected for clean-source acquisition; may be considered later only as external benchmark with explicit approval.
official_evidence: Hugging Face card states CC-BY-4.0 and 39.2 GB size; card describes degradation/noise.
license_notes: License is explicit, but source is rejected because this stage needs clean inputs and no full dataset downloads.

sources.name: Noisy OCR Dataset (NOD)
sources.license: Zenodo open record; license requires per-file verification
sources.dataset_size: Compressed archive about 26 GiB; uncompressed about 193 GiB.
sources.number_of_documents_or_pages: 18,504 images including Arabic Yarmouk and English Old Books variants.
sources.ground_truth_format: ground truth files; exact format needs archive inspection.
sources.mixed_language_coverage: separate Arabic/English collections, not mixed pages.
sources.historical_document_coverage: English old books; Arabic Yarmouk printed Wikipedia scans.
sources.checksum_availability: Zenodo checksums expected, not verified locally.
sources.known_limitations: Already noisy/distorted; huge archive exceeds safety cap.
sources.recommended_use: Rejected for clean-source acquisition; possible later benchmark only.
official_evidence: Zenodo page describes artificial noise variants and 26 GiB archive.
license_notes: Blocked: not clean and size exceeds limit.
